chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A.No.32 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA No.1707/2020 2. For orders on CMA No.1614/2020 3. For hearing of CMA No.320/2020 4. For hearing of main case. 20.01.2021 Mr. Rafique Ahmed, advocate for LRs of applicant. = None present for the respondents. Adjourned to a date in office. Repeat notice against the respondents, who has not yet been served. The status-quo till next date of hearing to be maintained by the parties. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
